e5.example: This is an apple. It is red and round. It is sweet.
This is my bag. It is blue. I put books in it.
This is a cat. It is white and cute. It likes to play.
My name is Lucy. I am seven. I like reading.
This is my family. I love my family.
My favorite animal is dog. It is cute.
I get up at 7. I go to school. I play after school.
My classroom is big and clean.
My favorite season is spring.
This is a dog. It is small and brown.
Tom is my friend. We play together.
My school is big. I like my school.
On Saturday I play. On Sunday I rest.
I have a pet rabbit. It is cute.
It is my birthday. I eat cake.
There are four seasons.
I see a bird. It can fly.
I like pizza. It is delicious.
This is a duck. It is yellow. It can swim.
My teacher is kind. She teaches me a lot.
My room is clean. I have a bed and a desk.
After school, I do homework. Then I play outside.
There is a big tree. It is green. A bird lives in it.
My grandpa is old. He tells me stories. I love him.
I go shopping with mom. We buy apples and bananas.
It is raining. I hold an umbrella. I jump in puddles.
I have a toy car. It is red. It goes very fast.
I help my friend with homework. She says thank you. I feel happy.
My grandma is kind. She cooks good food. I give her a hug.
I go to the park. I play on the slide and swing. I have fun.
I like ice cream. It is sweet and cold. I eat it in summer.
I see a flower. It is pretty. It smells good.
In the morning I wake up. At noon I have lunch. In the evening I read.
My pencil case has a pen, a ruler, and an eraser.
Spring is here. It is warm. Flowers bloom. Butterflies fly.
A butterfly is beautiful. It can fly. It has colorful wings.
I have a dream. I want to be a teacher. I will work hard.
I go to the zoo. I see monkeys and elephants. They are fun.
Summer is hot. I like to swim. I eat ice cream.
This is a fish. It swims in water. It is colorful.
Today is sports day. I run in a race. I have fun.
I have new shoes. They are blue. I can run fast in them.
The moon is round. It is bright at night. I like to look at it.
